title: troximon glaucum var. parviflorum
intro: Troximon glaucum var. parviflorum, also known as small-flowered troximon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Troximon glaucum var. parviflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine, particularly in the form of a decoction.
